creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 157383
Rename 'powerpc' to 'ppc' in enigmail filename

tar: Error opening archive: Failed to open '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/thunderbird/work/comm-esr31/mailnews/extensions/enigmail/build/enigmail-1.8.2-freebsd-powerpc64-gcc3.xpi'


The real file name is 'enigmail-1.8.2-freebsd-ppc64-gcc3.xpi'.

The attached patch should fix the problem.
